ksa_text: Knowledge of training data integrity risks and mitigation, including data poisoning attack vectors, supply chain contamination, label manipulation, detection methodologies, and prevention controls for AI model training pipelines.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA SP-K-011 (Security and Privacy/Knowledge) scores 0.428 composite (highest: NICE at 0.428) and is edge_case for the Data Lifecycle Manager role. Domain prior: edge. Core signal hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. Seniority is appropriate for manager-level Data Lifecycle Manager.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with edge_case scope, NICE signal (0.428), and Security and Privacy handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support Security/Privacy competencies for Data Lifecycle Manager?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Privacy and data security competencies appear in 25-60% of Data Lifecycle Manager postings, especially in regulated industries (finance, healthcare, public sector).
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Revised to exclude. Security content is policy/org-level, not data implementation. Not market-supported. Final decision: exclude.

decision_rationale: Revised to exclude. Security content is policy/org-level, not data implementation. Not market-supported. Final decision: exclude.
